title: Hearts In A Bottle
description: A mod that adds a new way to get more health!
body:
# Summary

This mod adds a bottle into your minecraft world that gives you a extra heart up to an extra row of hearts!

![Heart Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ce7a910eeac14127b7f4a45e0c17dd0f96c8485.png)![heart in a bottle recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85f64336f9b71b1490387501059683781c01680e.png)
